entityTypes.name: ci_diagnoses
entityTypes.description: One record per failed GitHub Actions run CI Medic has looked at: the failure class, confidence, and what it found in the actual job log

run_url.description: Full URL of the workflow run

workflow_name.description: Name of the workflow that ran

job_name.description: Name of the job that failed

conclusion.description: GitHub's conclusion for the run, e.g. "failure"

failure_class.description: What kind of failure the job log showed

confidence.description: mechanical_high_confidence means CI Medic drafted a fix; needs_human means diagnosis-only

diagnosis_summary.description: Plain-language summary of the log evidence and the conclusion

pr_url.description: URL of the drafted (parked) pull request, when confidence == mechanical_high_confidence

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp this diagnosis was made

entityTypes.name: receipt
entityTypes.description: Structured audit trail of automated actions taken by workspace agents, read by the receipts/team-health dashboard

kind.description: Always "receipt" — distinguishes this record from any other entity type

value.description: Numeric magnitude of the action — see unit

subject.description: What the action was about — a workflow run URL or a drafted PR branch/URL

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the action happened

agentSlug.description: The bot's marketplace slug that performed the action, e.g. "ci-medic"
